message:
refactor(perf): simplify strict-mode logging to use info() instead of info_ctx()

Replace the info_ctx() structured logging call with a simpler info()
call using an inline format string. The TestHarness logger's info_ctx()
method may not exist or have a different signature than expected,
causing compilation issues. Using info() with a pre-formatted string
containing the same key=value pairs preserves the diagnostic information
while avoiding API mismatches.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
